purpose: Named scaffold presets a solution spec can adopt instead of hand-writing its file layout, tests, and commands.
howToUse: In your solution spec's scaffold block, set boilerplate.answer to one of the names below. Any scaffold field you also fill in yourself overrides the boilerplate's version of it. These are starting points — edit this file or add your own presets to match how your team really works.

react-vite.description: TypeScript + React on Vite, tested with Vitest + React Testing Library. Works with Tailwind or plain CSS.
fileLayout: src/pages/ — one file per page, named after the page brief (CamelCase)
src/components/ — shared UI components
src/lib/ — shared helpers (apiClient, auth)
src/pages/__tests__/ and src/lib/__tests__/ — tests beside what they test
public/ — static assets
index.html, vite.config.ts, tsconfig.json — project config

testing.kinds: Unit tests for lib helpers and components; per page, one test for each check in the page brief's tests answer.

go-azure-functions.description: Go HTTP handlers hosted on Azure Functions (custom handler), table-driven tests with the standard library.
fileLayout: cmd/api/main.go — entry point and router
internal/handlers/ — one file per resource, matching the endpoint briefs
internal/auth/ — JWT validation and role checks
internal/models/ — request/response structs
internal/handlers/*_test.go — table-driven tests beside each handler
host.json, local.settings.json — Azure Functions config

testing.kinds: Table-driven tests per handler: happy path, auth required, wrong role — one case per operation in the endpoint brief.

dotnet-webapi.description: C# ASP.NET Core Web API tested with xUnit and WebApplicationFactory.
fileLayout: src/<Solution>.Api/Controllers/ — one controller per resource, matching the endpoint briefs
src/<Solution>.Api/Services/ — business logic behind the controllers
src/<Solution>.Api/Models/ — request/response and data models
tests/<Solution>.Tests/ — xUnit tests mirroring the src layout

testing.kinds: Integration test per endpoint operation (status codes, auth, roles) plus unit tests for services.

sql-server-database-project.description: SQL Server database project (DACPAC) — one .sql file per table, deployed with sqlpackage.
fileLayout: Tables/ — one CREATE TABLE .sql per database-model brief
StoredProcedures/ — one .sql per procedure, if any
Scripts/ — post-deployment seeds and reference data
<Solution>.sqlproj — the database project file

testing.framework: tSQLt (or plain verification scripts if tSQLt is unavailable)
testing.kinds: Per model: uniqueness, nullability, defaults, and relationship constraints from the database-model brief.
